parameters.name: cropleft
parameters.label: Crop Left
parameters.description: Positions the left edge of the image.

parameters.name: cropright
parameters.label: Crop Right
parameters.description: Positions the right edge of the image.

parameters.name: cropbottom
parameters.label: Crop Bottom
parameters.description: Positions the bottom edge of the image.

parameters.name: croptop
parameters.label: Crop Top
parameters.description: Positions the top edge of the image.

parameters.name: extend
parameters.label: Extend
parameters.description: This parameter determines what happens at the edges of the tiles.
